policy: read-only mirror. Re-pin via `python vendor_anatomy.py --repin-only` after replacing the binaries.

drift_detection.algorithm: sha256 over sorted (filename || NUL || bytes || NUL) for every entry in expected_files
drift_detection.note: The A11oy /anatomy viewer recomputes this hash in-browser over the served files on every load and compares it to upstream_sha. Drift surfaces a banner.
